Root Cause Found
⚠ Root Cause Identified
PO-4401 had a total value of ₹5.5L. Previous invoices consumed ₹5.2L (94.5%). Your invoice INV-0083 for ₹0.57L exceeds the remaining budget of ₹0.3L, triggering an auto-block.
